name: Duftmon: Leopard Mode

signature_move.name: Wolkenkratzer
signature_move.description: Causes towering pillars of bedrock to appear from the ground, tossing the opponent.

description: In " Leopard Mode ", its Special Moves are causing towering pillars of bedrock to appear from the ground, tossing the opponent ( Wolkenkratzer ), and running across the land and flying through the sky, tearing the opponent apart from every angle ( Blockade ). Also, the spherical tip of Duftmon's tail generates globe-shaped energy mines that become its weapon " Eroberung ", which it strategically encircles the opponent with.
